description: Training data for question classifier. Label 1 = question, label 0 = statement/non-question.

categories.technical: Technical interview questions about programming, algorithms, system design
categories.behavioral: Behavioral questions about experience, teamwork, challenges
categories.followup: Follow-up questions building on previous context
categories.general: General questions that don't fit other categories
